title: Llama 3.1 Released
description: Meta released Llama 3.1 with 8B, 70B, and 405B parameter models, representing the largest and most capable open-source LLM ever released. The 405B model matched or exceeded GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet on many benchmarks while remaining fully open-source. The release included 128K context windows and multilingual support across eight languages, marking a major milestone for open AI.
